ARGUED AND THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE TO THE COURT A COURTESY COPY OF THEIR EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS; DEFENDANT TO FILE RESPONSE, IF ANY, BY 10/10/08. Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Compliance With Arbitration Order;
Off Calendar Nov-07-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JOHN MUIR HEALTH'S Motion For Order Compelling Compliance With Arbitrator Order.
APPEARANCES: Patrick J. Cain, Esq. of Rodi Pollock Pettker Christian & Pramov 213/895-4900 x209 for pltfs & opposing parties; Karlene Rogers-Aberman, Esq. of Law Offices of Stephenson, Acquisto & Colman 925/734-6100 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court ruled as follows: Plaintiff to provide to the Court a courtesy copy of their evidentiary objections; defendant to file response, if any, by 10/10/08. In addition, parties to set forth the equivalent of a statement of decision supporting their respective arguments, not to exceed 5 pages by 10/10/08 at which time the Court will take the matter under submission. (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
